title: FastAPI Basics
text: FastAPI is a modern Python web framework used to build APIs quickly. It supports automatic documentation, data validation, and async endpoints. Teams commonly use it for internal ML services and model-serving APIs.

title: FAISS Overview
text: FAISS is a library for similarity search over dense vectors. It is commonly used in semantic search, retrieval pipelines, and retrieval augmented generation systems where low-latency nearest neighbor lookup is important.

title: Text Embeddings
text: Text embeddings convert sentences into numerical vectors. Those vectors capture semantic meaning and make it possible to compare similarity between queries and documents in search applications.

title: Chunking Strategies
text: Chunking splits large documents into smaller pieces before embedding. Well-designed chunk boundaries can improve retrieval accuracy, reduce noise, and make downstream generation more relevant.

title: ML Observability
text: Observability in ML systems includes latency measurement, request tracing, and usage monitoring. These signals help teams detect regressions, control cost, and understand production behavior.
